title: How We Replaced Connect Boards + Mirror Columns With a Smarter Sync

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
How We Replaced Connect Boards + Mirror Columns With a Smarter Sync

If you’ve been using monday.com for a while, you’ve probably tried keeping boards connected using Connect Boards + Mirror Columns.
It works… until your workspace grows.

That’s exactly what happened to us.

We had items living on multiple boards — Sales, Product, Support, Ops — and we were mirroring a few columns back and forth. But after some time we noticed:

  • Only some columns were mirroring

  • Comments didn’t move

  • Subitems stayed behind

  • Links broke if someone renamed or reorganized something

  • And everything felt slow and manual

At some point we realised:

“We don’t need mirrored columns. We need the same item everywhere.”

The problem with Connect Boards + Mirror Columns

For smaller setups, Connect Boards is fine.
But when multiple teams need to work on the same item, it becomes tiring to maintain.

Because:

  • It only mirrors selected columns

  • It doesn’t sync comments or replies

  • It doesn’t sync files or subitems

  • It’s easy to break links when you scale

  • And you end up with half-updated data across boards

We wanted something cleaner.

What we changed

Instead of trying to mirror pieces of an item, we started mirroring the entire item using our app, Mirror Item Multiple Boards.

Here’s our setup now:

  1. Teams keep using their own boards

  2. When an item is created, we run:
    “When item is created → mirror item to X board”

  3. The item now lives on all boards at once

  4. Any update, comment, file, subitem, or status change syncs instantly

No connect boards, no mirrored columns, no setup headaches.

Why this was a huge improvement

All boards stay perfectly aligned
Comments + replies sync everywhere
Subitems sync with full context
No breaking links
Works at scale
Teams stay updated without asking “Which board is correct?”

The biggest benefit?
Everyone now works on the same source of truth, even though each team still uses its own board and workflow.

If you’re currently relying on Connect Boards…

Try switching to regular columns + full item mirroring.
It’s cleaner, faster, and works better when your workspace grows.

If you want to try how we do it: Mirror Item Multiple Boards (Marketplace)
But even if you don’t use our app, the idea remains the same:
Stop mirroring columns. Start mirroring the item.
